title: Scale Celebrations Proportionally by Star Rating
description: 1★ = modest pulse; 2★ = full arpeggio + confetti; 3★ = extended fanfare, gold particles, freeze-frame.
notes: The celebration system already scales by stars — startCelebration(stars) varies particle count (30/60/120), colors (muted/full/gold), and flash duration. Audio playSuccess(stars) already scales from single chime to extended fanfare. This is already implemented.
acceptance: 1★: modest celebration (30 particles, muted colors, no flash)
2★: standard celebration (60 particles, full colors, short flash)
3★: extended celebration (120 particles, gold colors, long flash)
